rooms.title: Grandmother's Kitchen
rooms.marblePrompt: A warm, yellow-tiled kitchen with a fogged-up window, an old radio on the counter, and an enamel jug filled with wooden spoons on the sill. The air is thick with the smell of freshly baked bread. A low, morning sun casts a warm glow on the scene.
rooms.rationale: This room is designed to evoke a sense of warmth and comfort, with the yellow tiles and freshly baked bread creating a cozy atmosphere.

memories.label: Bread Baking
memories.note: Sunday mornings spent baking bread with grandmother
memories.rationale: Placed on the kitchen counter, where the action of baking took place, with the mixing bowl and utensils nearby
memories.objectPrompt: a mixing bowl with a wooden spoon

memories.label: Enamel Jug
memories.note: Enamel jug filled with wooden spoons on the windowsill
memories.rationale: Placed on the windowsill, where the morning light would highlight the jug and its contents
memories.objectPrompt: an enamel jug filled with wooden spoons

memories.label: Radio
memories.note: Old radio that only got one station
memories.rationale: Placed on the counter, where it would be easily accessible and visible
memories.objectPrompt: an old radio with a wooden cabinet

rooms.title: LA Trip
rooms.marblePrompt: A sun-bleached boardwalk with a low concrete wall, overlooking the ocean at sunset. The air is filled with the smell of fried dough and the sound of skaters in the distance. A paper kite flies overhead, its tail streaming behind it.
rooms.rationale: This room is designed to evoke a sense of freedom and relaxation, with the sun-bleached boardwalk and ocean view creating a calming atmosphere.

memories.label: Sunset
memories.note: Watching the sunset over the ocean from a low concrete wall
memories.rationale: Placed on the concrete wall, where the view of the sunset would be most prominent

memories.label: Kite
memories.note: A man selling paper kites on the boardwalk
memories.rationale: Placed near the entrance of the boardwalk, where the kite seller would be most visible

rooms.title: Quantum Studies
rooms.marblePrompt: A quiet, dimly lit study room with a large, wooden desk and a blackboard covered in equations. The air is thick with the smell of old books and the sound of quiet contemplation. A small, copper model of the solar system sits on a nearby plinth.
rooms.rationale: This room is designed to evoke a sense of focus and intellectual curiosity, with the dimly lit study room and equations on the blackboard creating a contemplative atmosphere.

memories.label: Entanglement Notes
memories.rationale: Placed on the wooden desk, where the notes would be most accessible and visible

memories.label: Solar System Model
memories.note: A small, copper model of the solar system
memories.rationale: Placed on a nearby plinth, where it would be easily visible and accessible
memories.objectPrompt: a small, copper model of the solar system

memories.label: Superposition Notes
memories.rationale: Placed on the blackboard, where the equations and notes would be most prominent
